scales.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-light
scales.caption: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-muted-foreground

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6A00] hover:bg-[#E85D00] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#243140] hover:border-[#FF6A00] text-[#F4F7FA] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-white/5 text-[#9FB0C3] hover:text-[#F4F7FA] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.base: bg-[#141C26] border border-[#243140] rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

inputs.base: bg-[#0A1018] border border-[#243140] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-[#F4F7FA] placeholder-[#475569] focus:border-[#FF6A00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6A00] outline-none transition-all

content.title: BIQc Foundation
content.subtitle: The core operating system for intelligent business.
features_list: Exposure Scan: Identify critical vulnerabilities in real-time.
Marketing Auto: Automate campaign tracking and performance analysis.
Decision Tracker: Log and audit key strategic moves.
SOP Generator: Create standard operating procedures from observed workflows.
Ingestion Audit: Verify data integrity across all connected sources.
Revenue Engine: Pipeline pressure mapping and forecast guidance.
Operations Intelligence: Surface bottlenecks and delivery friction.
Marketing Intelligence: Channel insight and campaign pressure signals.
Boardroom: Executive synthesis and decision framing.

more_features.logic: Waitlist items should show 'Open' button for Andre or authorized users instead of 'Join Waitlist'. Redirect unauthorized users to detail view with back arrow.

advisor.visual_fix: Remove flickering red animations from Business Brain or Critical Alert elements. Ensure alerts are static and stable.

access_control.rules: Super admin must have unrestricted access to all pages (Paid, Waitlist, Admin). No waitlist redirects for super admin.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do not use AI emoji characters.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Modify `DashboardLayout.js`: Implement the conditional logic for 'BIQc Foundation' sidebar item (Link for Free, Dropdown for Paid/Admin). Ensure 'BIQc Legal' is at the bottom.

2. Update `config/launchConfig.js`: Move Revenue, Operations, Marketing Intelligence, Boardroom from `WAITLIST_FEATURES` to `PAID_LAUNCH_ROUTES`. Add 'AI Learning Guarantee' and 'Trust Centre' to `LEGAL_TABS`.
3. Create `/app/frontend/src/pages/BIQcFoundationPage.js`: Implement the detailed feature list page.
4. Update `App.js`: Add route for `/biqc-foundation`. Update `LaunchRoute` to enforce paid access for the moved modules.
5. Update `BIQcLegalPage.js`: Ensure it renders all tabs defined in config.
6. Update `MoreFeaturesPage.js`: Reflect the removal of paid features. Fix the button logic for Andre (show 'Open').
7. Fix `AdvisorWatchtower.js`: Remove any `animate-pulse` or flickering classes from Business Brain alerts.
8. Ensure all removed/moved modules redirect to `/more-features` if accessed by unauthorized users (via `LaunchRoute` logic).
